overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through an illuminated tunnel and emerging into a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The camera maintains a first-person driving perspective throughout the journey from the enclosed concrete passage to the open urban streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel entrance ramp with overhead street lighting

events.description: vehicle enters the tunnel from the outside dusk environment

agents.ego_description: driving toward and entering the tunnel entrance at moderate speed

notable_agents.action: black car moving slowly on the left side near the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: large concrete tunnel entrance with overhead cover and dark interior
tall modern street lamp illuminating the approach ramp
dark wet road surface with double yellow divider lines

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a large concrete tunnel entrance at dusk. Street lamps illuminate the wet asphalt road as the vehicle enters the tunnel transition zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed vehicular tunnel with linear fluorescent ceiling lights

events.description: blue sports car overtakes from behind and passes on the right at high speed
approaching tunnel exit, natural light becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily through the tunnel interior maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: blue sports car overtaking and passing the ego vehicle

entered.detail: smooth grey concrete walls with vertical paneling and yellow base trim
bright linear white fluorescent lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling
double yellow divider lines running down the center of the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through the long enclosed tunnel illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. A blue sports car overtakes on the right, and the tunnel exit becomes visible as a bright point in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel exit portal with red LED warning lights and city view opening ahead

events.description: vehicle emerges from the tunnel into the open urban environment
transition from artificial fluorescent lighting to natural night and neon city lighting

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and entering the city streets with moderate traffic

entered.detail: concrete exit frame with vertical red LED warning light strips on both sides
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible through the tunnel exit
large digital advertisements glowing with cyan and purple neon light

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the tunnel exit framed by red LED lights. As it emerges, the scene transitions from the enclosed concrete passage to the open cyberpunk cityscape with towering neon-lit buildings visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk downtown intersection with massive holographic advertisements and palm-lined streets

events.description: vehicle navigates through intersection with other cars and pedestrians on sidewalks
vehicle turns right onto a curved road following the street alignment

agents.ego_description: navigating through neon-lit city streets, turning at intersections and following the road curve

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking on the sidewalk near the neon-lit storefronts
red car passing by on the left side of the intersection

entered.detail: tall buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and animated digital displays
palm trees lining the right side of the city street
orange metal guardrails along the left side of the curved road
modern street lamps with horizontal light bars illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle cruises through the vibrant cyberpunk downtown, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic neon advertisements. Palm trees line the streets as the vehicle navigates an intersection and follows the curving road past orange barriers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective that transitions from a dim concrete tunnel into a vibrant, neon-lit futuristic metropolis. It begins as the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance at dusk, gliding over wet asphalt illuminated by street lamps. As the camera enters the enclosed passage, the environment shifts to a corridor of overhead fluorescent lights where a blue sports car briefly overtakes on the right before a bright exit point appears in the distance. The scene then opens as the vehicle passes through a frame of red LED lights, emerging from the concrete confinement into a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape of towering skyscrapers. Finally, the view expands into the heart of downtown, cruising past holographic advertisements and palm trees while navigating a curving road marked by orange barriers.
